manifest.title: PXL Remediation Priorities
manifest.description: A reconciled fix list from the Phase 2 and Phase 3 reports, the authoritative findings index, current code checks, and planning documents.

charts.title: Audit finding disposition
charts.subtitle: 79 passed, 1 in progress, and 7 open out of 87 findings as of July 16, 2026
charts.question: How much of the audited finding portfolio is closed versus still active?
charts.rationale: A 100% stacked bar shows the closed-versus-active share without implying a time trend or ranking unlike items.

comparisonContext.denominator: 87 findings in the authoritative status index

tables.title: Active remediation register
tables.subtitle: Recommended dependency order; completion tests are described in the surrounding sections

query.sql: WITH finding_disposition(status, finding_count) AS (VALUES ('Retested Passed', 79), ('In Progress', 1), ('Open', 7)) SELECT 'All audit findings' AS portfolio, status, finding_count AS count, finding_count::numeric / 87 AS share FROM finding_disposition;
query.description: Materializes the reviewed July 16 findings-index disposition counts for the report chart.
filters: All 87 findings in the authoritative status index
metric_definitions: Share = status finding count divided by all 87 indexed findings.

sources.label: Active findings extracted from the PXL audit index

query.sql: WITH active_findings(priority_rank, finding, severity, status, fix, done_when, dependency) AS (VALUES (1, 'PXL-AUD-055', 'Critical', 'Open', 'Rotate the exposed service-role key and keep service-role material out of browser-visible VITE variables.', 'Rotation confirmed; secret guard and build pass; frontend remains anon-only.', 'External credential administration.'), (2, 'PXL-AUD-063', 'High', 'Open', 'Choose BIR configuration ownership and replace broad authenticated ALL policies with governed writes.', 'Ordinary users cannot mutate mappings; authorized UI and local/hosted RLS tests pass.', 'Requires product ownership decision.'), (3, 'PXL-AUD-066', 'High', 'Open', 'Resolve document dates for CAS number issuances and void evidence.', 'Held-out CAS test 027 passes 31 of 31 and historical packages include later-created evidence.', 'Precedes PXL-AUD-061 closure.'), (4, 'PXL-AUD-061', 'High', 'Open', 'Create named deterministic fresh, canonical, held-out, hosted-safe, and hosted-UI test lanes.', 'All 57 files and 1,045 assertions pass and CI reports lanes separately.', 'Depends on PXL-AUD-066.'), (5, 'PXL-AUD-053', 'High', 'In Progress', 'Finish Sales Invoice master decisions and complete view, source-chain, report, API, export, PDF, costing, and management-report validation.', 'Residual validation is closed or formally excluded and Sales Invoice can become APPROVED_REFERENCE.', 'Requires bounded product and master-data decisions.'), (6, 'PXL-AUD-059', 'High', 'Open', 'Maintain a table-coverage matrix and add authoritative workflows or explicit deferrals for active empty modules.', 'Unexpected active-table emptiness fails a check; intentional deferrals are documented.', 'Broad multi-module program; no artificial population.'), (7, 'PXL-AUD-060', 'Medium', 'Open', 'Wire login labels, names, autocomplete attributes, and an accessible error region.', 'Playwright uses getByLabel for both fields and errors are announced accessibly.', 'Independent frontend fix.'), (8, 'PXL-AUD-067', 'Medium', 'Open', 'Scope the checklist as core accounting readiness and add conditional operational sections.', 'Profile tests prevent false-ready states and prove correct Not Applicable behavior.', 'Requires an approved checklist product model.')) SELECT priority_rank, finding, severity || ' · ' || status AS priority_state, fix, done_when, dependency FROM active_findings ORDER BY priority_rank;
query.description: Materializes the eight active finding rows and their report-level remediation criteria in dependency order.
filters: Status is Open or In Progress in the July 16 authoritative index
metric_definitions: Priority rank is a recommended dependency order, not an audit severity score.

query.description: Reconciled Phase 2 audit observations with the later Phase 3 implementation and validation results.
filters: Phase 3 supersedes Phase 2 where a finding was explicitly retested
metric_definitions: Current status follows the latest dated retest and the authoritative findings index.

query.description: Reviewed the accounting-core gate and product backlog to separate release defects from post-gate enhancements.
filters: Release-blocking defects separated from backlog enhancements

query.description: Checked the current login form, CI jobs, BIR policies, CAS package implementation, and setup checklist labels against the open findings.
filters: Read-only inspection of finding-specific implementation surfaces

blocks.body:
## Executive Summary

- **PXL is not production-ready yet.** The authoritative July 16 index has **8 active findings**: 1 Critical, 5 High, and 2 Medium.
- **The first action is operational, not a code patch.** Rotate the previously exposed Supabase service-role key and confirm the frontend remains anon-only (PXL-AUD-055).
- **The most direct engineering path is BIR policy hardening, then the CAS date-semantics fix.** Fixing PXL-AUD-066 unlocks the held-out CAS test and enables PXL-AUD-061 to close with a fully green 57-file lane.
- **Broad completion claims should remain constrained.** Sales Invoice validation, active-table workflow coverage, login accessibility, and operational-readiness labeling still need work even though hosted data visibility and core reconciliation now pass.

## Most audit findings are closed, but the release gate remains blocked

The portfolio is **79 Retested Passed, 1 In Progress, and 7 Open**. The chart shows that the remaining work is a small share of the full audit, but severity—not volume—controls readiness: one unresolved Critical is enough to block production use.

## Fix these in dependency order

**1. Close credential exposure first.** PXL-AUD-055 requires external service-role key rotation, followed by the existing secret guard and production build checks.

**2. Harden statutory configuration access.** For PXL-AUD-063, decide whether BIR form metadata is immutable global reference data, admin-maintained configuration, or RPC-governed setup; then replace broad authenticated write policies and prove ordinary users cannot mutate mappings.

**3. Correct CAS historical evidence semantics.** PXL-AUD-066 needs document-date resolution for number issuances and voids so a historical package includes evidence created after the document period.

**4. Make the test lanes explicit and green.** Once the CAS defect is fixed, PXL-AUD-061 should formalize named fresh-schema, canonical-seeded, held-out CAS, hosted-safe, and hosted-UI commands/jobs and require 57 files / 1,045 assertions.

**5. Complete the in-progress Sales Invoice contract.** PXL-AUD-053 still needs product decisions for Project, Location, and Functional Entity masters plus full view-state, source-chain, report, API, export, PDF, costing, and management-report validation.

**6. Turn table coverage into governed scope.** PXL-AUD-059 is a program of classification and authoritative workflow fixtures—not a request to insert artificial rows. Banking, fixed assets, returns, approvals, schedules, and compliance generators need either a supported scenario with UI/RLS tests or an explicit deferral.

## Recommended next steps

1. Rotate the service-role key and capture confirmation.
2. Implement and test the BIR form/mapping policy migration.
3. Implement the CAS document-date resolver and make test 027 pass 31/31.
4. Add named package scripts and CI jobs for the documented test lanes.
5. Run the Sales Invoice product decisions and validation as a bounded workstream.
6. Build the table-coverage matrix, then schedule authoritative module scenarios by risk.
7. Take the two Medium fixes as bounded UI/product tasks: accessible login semantics and an explicitly scoped operational-readiness checklist.
8. Update stale status and AI coordination documents so they reflect 79 passed / 1 in progress / 7 open.

## Further questions

- Who is authorized to maintain global BIR form mappings: platform administrator, company owner/admin, or only a governed server process?
- Are Project, Location, and Functional Entity required for the first production release, or should they be formally excluded from the Sales Invoice reference contract?
- Which currently empty module families are release scope versus explicitly deferred: banking, fixed assets, returns, approvals, schedules, or statutory-return generation?
- Should the setup checklist remain a core-accounting gate with a new name, or become a multi-section operational implementation checklist?

## After the release blockers

The applicable planning documents identify valuable work that should remain **post-gate enhancement scope**, unless a new defect makes it blocking: a configuration-driven account-determination engine, broader tax-rule/profile governance, governed Project/Location and sales-context masters, an automatic reconciliation suite, and continued rollout of the standard transaction workspace. These are important, but they should not blur the eight current audit items.

## Caveats and assumptions

- The **Findings Status Index** is treated as authoritative because it is dated July 16 and explicitly declares that role. Older `STATUS.md`, `AI_STATE.md`, `AI_WORK_QUEUE.md`, and `AI_HANDOFF.md` snapshots still claim zero open findings or smaller totals and should be synchronized.
- The current docs-consistency script passes for 87 findings and 57 pgTAP files, but it does not detect those stale status/AI summaries.
- Phase 2 observations marked Retested Passed in Phase 3 are excluded from the fix list. Remaining UI drilldown breadth and Playwright conversion are regression-hardening work unless attached to an active finding.
- PXL-AUD-059 is intentionally broad. Closing it requires supported workflow evidence or explicit deferral decisions; table population alone is not proof of implementation readiness.

sourceNotes.scope: Phase 2 and Phase 3 remediation status through July 16, 2026, reconciled on July 17, 2026
sourceNotes.comparison_basis: Phase 3 retests supersede Phase 2 findings; the findings index controls current status

chart_map.segment: Most audit findings are closed, but the release gate remains blocked
chart_map.question: How much of the audit portfolio is closed versus still active?
chart_map.supported_claim: 79 of 87 findings passed, but 8 remain active
chart_map.palette_policy: relaxed multi-category with labels and a visible legend

sourceNotes.visual_qa_note: A single composition chart was selected because the primary deliverable is an exact remediation register; additional charts would add little decision value.

active_findings.fix: Rotate the previously exposed Supabase service-role key externally; keep all service-role material out of VITE variables and browser artifacts.
active_findings.done_when: Rotation is confirmed; secret guard and production build pass; normal frontend access uses only anon/authenticated credentials.
active_findings.dependency: External Supabase credential administration; cannot be closed by repository code alone.

active_findings.fix: Choose the ownership model for BIR forms/mappings, replace broad authenticated ALL policies, and govern writes through admin-only policies or audited RPCs.
active_findings.done_when: Ordinary authenticated users can read required metadata but cannot insert, update, or delete it; authorized UI paths still work; local and hosted RLS tests pass.
active_findings.dependency: Product decision on global statutory-configuration ownership.

active_findings.fix: Resolve source document dates for number issuances; filter void evidence by document_date with occurrence fallback while retaining allocation time for unbound reservations.
active_findings.done_when: Held-out CAS test 027 passes 31/31 and historical packages include later-created number and void evidence for documents in the requested period.
active_findings.dependency: Precedes full CI-lane closure under PXL-AUD-061.

active_findings.fix: Add named, deterministic fresh-schema, canonical-seeded, held-out CAS, hosted-safe, and hosted-UI test commands/jobs with documented reset prerequisites.
active_findings.done_when: All 57 pgTAP files / 1,045 assertions pass after the CAS fix and CI reports each lane separately without ambiguous all-files behavior.
active_findings.dependency: Depends on PXL-AUD-066 for the final green 57-file lane.

active_findings.fix: Decide and govern Project/Location/Functional Entity masters; complete Sales Invoice view-state, SO/DR source chain, report/API/export/PDF, costing, and management-report validation.
active_findings.done_when: The residual validation matrix is closed or formally excluded and Sales Invoice can truthfully move to VALIDATED / APPROVED_REFERENCE.
active_findings.dependency: Requires bounded product and master-data decisions; do not propagate unvalidated assumptions to later workspaces.

active_findings.fix: Maintain a table-coverage matrix and add authoritative workflow/UI/RLS scenarios for active empty modules, or explicitly classify them as unsupported/future/deprecated.
active_findings.done_when: Unexpected active-table emptiness fails a coverage check, while intentionally deferred tables are documented and do not create false readiness claims.
active_findings.dependency: Broad program across banking, fixed assets, returns, approvals, schedules, and compliance generators; never close through artificial row insertion.

active_findings.fix: Associate login labels and inputs; add names, autocomplete attributes, and an accessible error region; review other high-traffic forms for the same pattern.
active_findings.done_when: Playwright can fill Email and Password with getByLabel and login failures are announced accessibly.

active_findings.fix: Rename the current checklist as core accounting readiness and add conditional operational sections for inventory, service-only, banking, approvals, and branch access.
active_findings.done_when: Profile-based tests prove correct Ready and Not Applicable states and prevent operational false-positive readiness.
active_findings.dependency: Requires an approved checklist product model; no data migration expected.
